phases.name: CLM thermal benchmark
phases.method: nvidia-smi --query-gpu=power.draw,timestamp --format=csv -lms 100 during 1000-token Qwen-7B generation, batch-1, fp16

phases.name: EEG metabolic anchor (literature)
phases.method: cite-chain confirmation: Attwell-Laughlin 2001 + Carter-Bean 2009 + Howarth 2012; cross-check ATP/spike value 1.2e8 against 3 independent sources

phases.name: AKIDA dev-kit wattmeter bench
hardware_needed: controlled spike-rate workload (Edge Impulse keyword-spotting demo)
phases.method: measure idle power vs active inference power; divide delta by spike count from Akida runtime profiler
phases.deliverable: energy_per_spike_J empirical (vendor pJ/event vs system nJ/inference)
phases.blocker: AKD1000 dev kit arrival (ordered 2026-04-29, ETA TBD)

phases.name: Joint T1-A3 graduation report
phases.method: merge phases 1-3 into single ratio table; pre-registered falsifiers F-floor / F-AKIDA-window / F-EEG-window / F-CLM-bound / F-honest-C3 evaluated
phases.deliverable: T1-A3 graduation verdict (PASS/FAIL/HOLD) + cross-substrate energy hierarchy claim
